info.title: HiringPizza Workforce API
info.description: Workflow-first API for workforce management. Employee operations are store-scoped by store number. Global catalog endpoints are not store-scoped.

put.description: Single endpoint to create, update, and optionally delete catalog rows. For each item array: include `id` to update an existing row, omit `id` to create a new row.

get.description: Store-scoped listing with broad filtering, sorting, and pagination options. `q` is the unified search field for names and SSN values (full or last 4).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Unified search. Matches first/middle/last names and SSN digits (full or partial, including last 4).

post.summary: Create employee via full workflow payload

put.summary: Update employee via full workflow payload

post.description: Initiates a separation workflow. Employee status only changes upon decision approval. Store-scoped: employee must be assigned to this store.

post.summary: Approve or reject a separation request
post.description: Records decision on separation request. When decision='completed', employee status automatically updates to terminated/resigned and status history is recorded.

post.summary: Create hiring request with position details and optional candidates
post.description: Initiates hiring workflow for one or more positions. Position count must equal employees_needed minus candidate count. Store-scoped.

post.summary: Complete hiring request by recording hired employees
post.description: Records which employees were hired. All employee IDs must exist and count must match number_hired.

storeNumber.name: storeNumber
storeNumber.description: Store number identifier used for scoping employee workflow routes.

positions.description: If an item has `id`, it updates that row. If `id` is omitted, a new row is created.

marital_statuses.description: If an item has `id`, it updates that row. If `id` is omitted, a new row is created.

id_types.description: If an item has `id`, it updates that row. If `id` is omitted, a new row is created.

attachment_types.description: If an item has `id`, it updates that row. If `id` is omitted, a new row is created.

tag_ids.description: Attachment tags to sync for this attachment type

tags.description: If an item has `id`, it updates that row. If `id` is omitted, a new row is created.

attachments.description: Proof files for the separation request

positions.description: Position details. Count must equal employees_needed - candidate count

employee_ids.description: IDs of employees to hire (must exist)
